idea.title: Scrub Master
idea.hook: Scrub away grime, rust, and stains layer by layer to restore filthy objects to a spotless shine.
idea.prototype: Layered restoration scrubber: drag a brush over a portrait hero object to erode 2-3 grime layers (mud-rust-tarnish) and reveal the gleaming object; a scrub-energy budget (not a timer) is the only pressure.
idea.mutation_of: Ice Sweeper + Clean Sweep (our cleaning winners)
idea.why_novel: layered restoration scrubber implementing the literal Ice Sweeper request for 2-3 breakable layers + meta; energy-budget pressure
idea.lose_condition: scrub energy hits 0 below the cleanliness quota

sources.title: Ice Sweeper (cleaning) 48.6s/play 👍4/👎0
sources.snippet: top comment: 'implement 2-3 layered breakable layers, add sounds, meta upgrades'

sources.title: cleaning family — 44 plays, 94% positive (👍15/👎1)
sources.snippet: our most-played + most-liked family; proven retention

sources.title: Очистка плиток: Помоги королю (Yodomi)
sources.snippet: fresh tile-cleaning launch corroborates demand for satisfying cleaning

synthesizer_brief: KNOWLEDGE pick: extend our top-retaining cleaning family with a fresh layered restoration scrubber executing Ice Sweeper's literal depth request; clear 5s goal, mobile-portrait controls, real depth + meta.

alternatives.title: Rust & Shine
alternatives.hook: sand and polish rusty metal back to mirror finish

alternatives.title: Tile Sparkle
alternatives.hook: tap-clean a grid of grimy tiles

alternatives.title: Stain Out
alternatives.hook: scrub stubborn stains out of fabric with targeted strokes
